headline: Brian Niccol's Starbucks Turnaround Is Quietly Working -- Even With Profit Cut in Half. The July 29 Test Comes Next.
summary: Shares sit near a 52-week high even though profit was cut in half last year. Here's what the market sees.

headline: SecureSpace University Place Opens in University Place, WA
summary: SecureSpace Self Storage ("SecureSpace"), a leading self-storage platform with locations across key urban markets in the U.S., has opened its newest location at 7701 40th Street West in University Place, WA.

headline: Can Starbucks Turn Traffic Gains Into Sustainable Earnings Growth?
summary: SBUX raises its fiscal 2026 outlook as traffic growth, margin recovery and cost savings strengthen the turnaround.

headline: Luckin Coffee (OTCPK:LKNC.Y) Enters New York, Is The Stock Still Cheap?
summary: Luckin Coffee (OTCPK:LKNC.Y) is stepping into New York City, adding a fresh competitor to an already crowded US coffee market and putting its cashless, high-volume model directly up against Starbucks and other established chains. See our latest analysis for Luckin Coffee. At a share price of US$32.05, Luckin Coffee has seen short term momentum pick up, with a 1 day share price return of 4.74% and 30 day share price return of 5.05%, while its year to date share price return is down 9.49%.
